user.title: Add stop
user.description: Find your stop ID at [Entur](https://entur.no) or use the NSR ID directly (e.g. NSR:StopPlace:62356).

error.invalid_stop_id: Invalid stop ID. Make sure it starts with NSR:StopPlace:
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to Entur API. Please try again.
error.stop_not_found: No stop found with this ID.
